platforms.name: WhatsApp
platforms.description: Join our WhatsApp groups for real-time trading, market updates, and community discussions. Our Exchange also operates via WhatsApp for quick, human-assisted crypto trades.

platforms.name: Discord
platforms.description: Our Discord server is the hub for structured learning discussions, course Q&As, study groups, and community events. Join channels for every learning track and topic.

platforms.name: YouTube
platforms.description: Watch video tutorials, market analysis, course previews, and community spotlights on our YouTube channel. New content every week to keep you informed and inspired.

platforms.name: X (Twitter)
platforms.description: Follow us on X for bite-sized crypto insights, platform announcements, market commentary, and community highlights. Stay in the loop in real time.

platforms.name: Telegram
platforms.description: Get instant trade alerts, market signals, and quick community polls in our Telegram group. A fast-paced channel for traders who want to stay ahead.
